description: Configure Microsoft Edge with three custom search engines for OSINT (Open Source Intelligence) workflows: Wayback Machine (Keyword: 'wayback', URL: 'https://web.archive.org/web/*/%s'), crt.sh (Keyword: 'crt', URL: 'https://crt.sh/?q=%s'), and Shodan (Keyword: 'shodan', URL: 'https://www.shodan.io/search?query=%s'). Verify each search engine by performing a search for 'example.com' and create a report at /home/ga/Desktop/osint_config_report.txt listing the configured tools and confirming the verification.
